edge_hypothesis: EMA_9/EMA_21 crossovers are the simplest trend-following signal — lower lag than MACD histogram and zero parameter ambiguity. Prior EMA crossover results showed PF=1.07 but high DD (3.96) made it unacceptable. The MACD ACCEPT (PF=1.35) proved that wide exits overcome fee drag: fewer trades, larger wins per round-trip. Applying the same wide-exit philosophy to EMA crossovers should lift PF by reducing fee impact while preserving the crossover's low-lag advantage. ADX regime gating filters out ranging markets where crossovers whipsaw. Regime assumption: TRENDING (ADX>20). Invalidation: if PF < 1.0 with wide exits and ADX gating, the EMA crossover signal itself is too noisy for crypto even in trending regimes.

variants.name: ema_cross_trending_wide
variants.description: EMA_9/21 crossover gated to trending regimes (ADX>20) with wide 3:1 R:R exits. The ADX gate eliminates ranging whipsaws that destroyed PF in ungated tests. Wide exits apply the validated fee-killer philosophy.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 4h and 1h
exit_rules: Exit long when EMA_9 crosses back below EMA_21.
Exit short when EMA_9 crosses back above EMA_21.
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (3.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: EMA crossovers can cluster in congestion zones even with ADX>20
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 3.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: ema_crossover baseline — EMA_9 vs EMA_21 crossover
ema_crossover confirmation — dual EMA cross signal
ema_crossover volatility gate — ATR-based wide exits

variants.name: ema_cross_ultra_wide_fee_killer
variants.description: EMA_9/21 crossover with ultra-wide 4:1 R:R and loose ADX>15 gate. Maximizes the fee-killer effect: very wide TP means only the strongest trends produce winners, but when they do, each win is 4x the risk. Fewer but larger wins to overcome the 62% fee drag problem.
entry_long: ADX_14 > 15 confirms at least moderate trend.
entry_short: ADX_14 > 15 confirms at least moderate trend.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 4h and 1h
exit_rules: Exit long when EMA_9 crosses back below EMA_21.
Exit short when EMA_9 crosses back above EMA_21.
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (4.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: 4x ATR TP may only be hit in extended moves, reducing win rate significantly
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 4.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: ema_crossover baseline — EMA_9 vs EMA_21 crossover
ema_crossover confirmation — dual EMA cross signal
ema_crossover volatility gate — ultra-wide 4x ATR TP

variants.name: ema_cross_dd_compression_strong_trend
variants.description: EMA_9/21 crossover with strict ADX>25 gate and tight DD cap (10%). Tests whether filtering to strong trends only can compress the DD that killed prior EMA crossover results (DD=3.96). Moderate R:R (2.5:1) for faster profit realization. Trades should be fewer but higher quality.
entry_long: ADX_14 > 25 confirms strong trending regime only.
entry_short: ADX_14 > 25 confirms strong trending regime only.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 4h and 1h
exit_rules: Exit long when EMA_9 crosses back below EMA_21.
Exit short when EMA_9 crosses back above EMA_21.
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (2.5x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: ADX>25 may filter too aggressively, producing insufficient trades for statistical significance
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 2.5x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: ema_crossover baseline — EMA_9 vs EMA_21 crossover
ema_crossover confirmation — dual EMA cross signal
ema_crossover volatility gate — DD compression target
